name: Panama Canal Clash
short_description: Who will become the master of the Panama Canal? Everything will be decided in the game Panama Canal Clash!
detailed_description:
Memorize the cards. Capture the channel. Win!

"Panama Canal Clash" is a classic memorial game with geopolitical overtones! The Panama Canal has become the scene of a confrontation between the US and China. Choose your side and play out the key events in the struggle for the strategic waterway!

Your task is to find the paired cards that symbolize the influence of your faction. But be careful: memorizing the arrangement of the cards is one thing, but winning the battle for supremacy is quite another!

Key Features:

🃏 Two sets of cards - 5 unique cards for each faction (USA vs China).

🧠 Pump up your memory - classic memory mechanics in a political setting.

⚔️ Choose your side - become the economic wizard of the USA or the strategist of China.

🎭 Vivid cartoon illustrations - memorize events with a dose of irony!

🏆 Compete with friends - who can memorize and find all the paired cards faster?

Who will become the master of the Panama Canal? Everything will be decided in the game Panama Canal Clash!
